user_question: I want to explore an AI study product for university students before deciding whether to build it.

panel.role_summary: Product wedge and value proposition judge
Downside risk and validation discipline reviewer
Thin technical loop and feasibility explainer

turns.user_input: Start by finding the smallest useful product wedge.

speakers.content: Start with a specific repeated study moment, not a broad AI learning platform.
The first test should prove retention under low-cost conditions before any broader roadmap.

consensus_points: The room should start from a narrow repeated study moment.
open_questions: Which moment has enough frequency and pain to justify a separate product?
tension_points: A delightful product wedge can still fail if retention is not proven early.
summaries.recommended_next_step: Interview five students about one recurring study bottleneck and define one retention test.

notes: This fixture validates schema shape only.
It is not host-live validation and not provider-live validation.
